subcodes.first_line: O Breezes of the earth and its mysteries, O Leaves of the Lote-Tree and its fruits! Blessed are ye, for ye have chosen for yourselves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نفحات الارض و اسرارها و اوراق السدره و اثمارها طوبی لکن قد اتخذتن لانفسکن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
